# Images missing in docs examples

**Describe the bug**
Images in documentation are missing (broken)

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to https://neomjs.github.io/pages/node_modules/neo.mjs/dist/production/docs/index.html
2. Click on 'Tutorias -> create-app script'
3. Scroll down to '1. After running the script, you will get asked to...
4. See error
